name: Eels in Piquant Sauce ( All i Pebre)
recipeInstructions:
A favorite Valencian tapa as well as a popular main dish, especially along the Costa Blanca. A cold beer might go best with this piquant tapa.
Clean and skin eels and cut into 1- to 1 1/2-inch pieces. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a casserole or skillet, add paprika, and stir in enough water to cover the eels. Bring to a boil and add pieces of eel. Meanwhile, crush garlic, almonds, parsley, and saffron with enough olive oil to make a smooth paste using a mortar and pestle or an electric blender. Stir the mixture into the casserole, add salt to taste, and cook for about 20 minutes or until the eels are done. If the sauce thickens, add more water. Serve hot.
Variation: For an all-in-one meal or a main course, add peas, chopped carrots, or new potatoes (or all three) and serve over rice, as they do in Valencia.
